session_1.speaker: Alex
session_1.text: I just started at TechCorp three weeks ago as a Junior Developer on the payments team. My manager is Bob — he has been here six years and manages twelve people across two squads. The office is in downtown Portland.

session_1.speaker: Sam
session_1.text: Sounds like a good start! What's the tech stack like?

session_1.speaker: Alex
session_1.text: Mostly Go and React. There's some internal tooling with basically zero documentation. Bob said he'd pair with me next week to walk through the deployment pipeline.

session_1.speaker: Alex
session_1.text: There's a food cart pod right next to the office on Alder Street. I've been eating lunch there almost every day.

session_1.speaker: Sam
session_1.text: That's a solid perk. Keep me posted on how the pairing session goes.

qa.question: What is Alex's job title and company?
Who is Alex's manager and how long has he been at the company?
qa.answer: Bob, who has been at TechCorp for six years.

qa.question: What is the main perk Alex enjoys near the TechCorp office?
qa.answer: A food cart pod on Alder Street in downtown Portland.
